title: My Garden Folding Chair Set of 2 Fold Up Deck Chairs for Kids 600D Polyester Fabric Beach, Garden, Patio & Picnic Chairs Easy to Carry Lightweight Outdoor Camping Chair (Aqua Green)
features: Versatile Folding Chairs for Outdoors: Whether you're heading to the beach, garden, picnic, or camping trip, these outdoor chairs are a perfect fit. This set of 2 fold up chairs combines the function of a folding camping chair with the style of deck chairs, making them ideal for any outdoor occasion or patio setting.

Picnic Chair for Kids Build with 600D Fabric: Made from strong powder-coated steel frames and breathable 600D polyester fabric, these folding chairs outdoor are built to endure various weather conditions. They provide reliable support and comfort, making them suitable as durable deck chairs for Kids at any outdoor event.

Lightweight & Portable Design: These picnic chairs are designed with convenience in mind—lightweight yet sturdy, and fold flat quickly for easy storage or transport. Perfect for taking to festivals, parks, beaches, or using as patio chairs at home, these folding garden chairs make relaxing anywhere a breeze.

Comfortable Fold Up Chair with Armrests: Designed for ultimate relaxation, each chair includes powder-coated twin armrests and a spacious seat. Whether you're looking for beach chairs, garden chairs, or deck chairs, these outdoor chairs provide the ideal mix of comfort and ergonomic support.

Stylish Garden Chairs Set of 2: Elevate your outdoor seating with this vibrant set of 2 garden chairs available in Aqua Green & Aqua Blue, With dimensions of 76x53x46cm and a fold-flat frame, these folding garden chairs are easy to maintain and store—ideal for any patio or outdoor setup.
description: Product description Welcome to Outdoor Comfort: Introducing the My Garden Folding Picnic Chair Set of 2, available in charming Green, soothing Grey, and classic Blue. Robust Construction: Crafted with a flexible and durable 600D Polyester Fabric and supported by a powder-coated, sturdy steel frame, this chair is built for enduring outdoor enjoyment. Portable Elegance: Lightweight and foldable, this chair is your perfect companion for outdoor adventures. The breathable fabric ensures a comfortable and relaxing experience. Smart Design: Featuring twin powder-coated armrests, a strong steel tube frame, and a fold-flat design for easy storage. Wipe clean with a damp cloth for hassle-free maintenance. Dimensions: Unfold the comfort with dimensions of 76x53x46cm. Grab your set today and make every outdoor moment a relaxing retreat! Safety Warning Always ensure the chair is fully unfolded and locked before use. Do not exceed the maximum weight capacity of 1.5 kilograms. Keep fingers and other body parts away from the folding mechanism. Always store the chair with the fabric facing up to prevent damage to the frame.
